questions.prompt: Какая форма пассива используется с маркером 'every day'?

choices.text: The windows are cleaned every day.
The windows were cleaned every day.
The windows have been cleaned every day.
The windows had been cleaned every day.

questions.explanation: Маркер 'every day' указывает на Present Simple passive, поэтому используется форма 'are cleaned'.

questions.prompt: Какая форма пассива используется с маркером 'usually'?

choices.text: The car is washed usually.
The car was washed usually.
The car has been washed usually.
The car had been washed usually.

questions.explanation: Маркер 'usually' указывает на Present Simple passive, поэтому используется форма 'is washed'.
